context: Agent must identify that ReadOnlyStorage violates the base class contract by throwing on save, and produce a redesign that prevents the violation

checklist.name: LSP violation correctly identified
checklist.description: lsp-analysis.md names ReadOnlyStorage.save as the violating method and states it breaks the base contract (which promises no throws)

checklist.name: Impact on callers explained
checklist.description: lsp-analysis.md explains that callers of FileStorage.save cannot substitute ReadOnlyStorage without catching unexpected exceptions or adding instanceof checks

checklist.name: IReadableStorage interface produced
checklist.description: IReadableStorage.ts exists and declares only a read method returning Promise<string | null>

checklist.name: IWritableStorage interface produced
checklist.description: IWritableStorage.ts exists and declares only a save method returning Promise<void>

checklist.name: ReadOnlyStorage implements only IReadableStorage
checklist.description: The updated or described ReadOnlyStorage implements IReadableStorage (not IWritableStorage) so the save contract violation is eliminated
